title: Improve score detail and list loading states
description: Add skeleton loading states and progressive score-version loading. Score detail must not show zero versions/no guidelines while loading. Score-level procedure/evaluation lists should clear stale rows and show task-shaped skeletons while loading or applying sort/filter changes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented score detail skeletons and progressive score-version loading, plus task-shaped loading states for procedure/evaluation lists during initial load and sort/filter changes. Focused dashboard tests and typecheck pass.
